steps.title: Find the seaweed difference
steps.content: The notes say participants rated North Pacific konbu's umami intensity as moderate and arame's as high. To emphasize a difference, the answer must contrast those two intensity ratings.

steps.title: Reject similarity-focused options
steps.content:
• Choice B groups both seaweeds together as umami-triggering foods instead of contrasting them.
  • Choice C shifts attention to tuna and garlic rather than the difference between the seaweeds.
  • Choice D only says both are brown seaweed and gives no difference in umami intensity.
The answer is A.
